name: KarmaForge Swarm
description: Self-Evolving Verifiable AI Trading Agent with On-Chain Reputation Feedback Loop

components.name: Signal Agent
components.description: fetches real-time data via Kraken CLI public commands only (ticker, ohlc, orderbook)

components.name: Risk Guardian Agent
components.description: reads live ERC-8004 reputation score and dynamically scales position size, drawdown cap, Kelly fraction

components.name: Strategy Agent
components.description: RSI + momentum on Kraken CEX (60% allocation) + simulated Aerodrome LP yield (40% allocation)

components.name: Validator Agent
components.description: creates EIP-712 signed TradeIntent + validation artifact for EVERY decision

components.name: Reflector Agent
components.description: runs every 4 hours, uses summarizer, proposes 1-2 tiny numeric tweaks only
